description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage, a driveway, and a landscaped yard featuring trees, shrubs, and a swimming pool. The main building is painted white with green window shutters and has a gable roof, while the garage and an additional structure share similar roofing. The front facade includes a central entryway with double doors, flanked by symmetrical windows and decorative bushes. The backyard area features a patio with outdoor furniture and a pool, partially surrounded by greenery and a privacy fence. The property is bordered by a paved driveway and walkways, with a car parked in front of the garage. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, with clean lines and a balanced, formal appearance.
description: A two-story white house with green shutters, a detached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool. The design is formal and symmetrical, with a central entryway and gable roofs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, detached garage, car, and prominent landscaping with trees and bushes.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard patio, outdoor furniture, pool area, and the back of the garage.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, side yard, and the rear facade of the house with large windows and patio doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side yard, and additional trees, with a clear view of the house's side elevation.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with steps, flanked by symmetrical windows and decorative bushes, no porch or columns.
